scripts.generate:directory: pnpm run clean && ttsx node_modules/typia/src/executable/typia.ts generate --input src/input --output src/output
scripts.generate:files: pnpm run clean && ttsx node_modules/typia/src/executable/typia.ts generate --project tsconfig.files.json --output src/output src/input/modules/generate_module.ts
scripts.start: pnpm run generate:directory && pnpm run build && pnpm run generate:files && pnpm run build
